name: datacenter-mcp-server
title: Data Center Engineering MCP Server
description: Mission-critical data center design & engineering tools for AI agents. This MCP server exposes six powerful tools: cooling load calculations (kW, tons, BTU, CFM with PUE and altitude derating), power redundancy analysis (UPS, generator, PDU sizing for N/N+1/2N/2N+1), tier classification assessments (Uptime Institute Tier I-IV gap analysis), commissioning plan generation (ASHRAE-based with test procedures), rack density analysis (air/containment/liquid cooling recommendations), and reference lookups for tier requirements and PUE benchmarks. Perfect for infrastructure planning, capacity modeling, and data center operational analysis.

API_KEY.title: API Key (Optional)
API_KEY.description: Optional API key for authentication if using with a managed service

PORT.title: Server Port
PORT.description: HTTP port to run the MCP server on (default: 3000)
